---
title: "AQI Analysis"
format: html
---

```{python}
import pandas as pd
import altair as alt
import time
import warnings
import numpy as np
import os
```
```{python}
aqi_all = pd.read_csv('AQI_data/aqi_all.csv')

aqi_all.head()
aqi_all['Date'] = pd.to_datetime(aqi_all['Date'])
```

```{python}
#plotting aqi over time 

aqi_all["YearMonth"] = aqi_all["Date"].dt.to_period("M").astype(str)

monthly_avg = (
    aqi_all
    .groupby("YearMonth")["AQI"]
    .mean()
    .reset_index()
)

illinois_aqi = alt.Chart(monthly_avg).mark_line().encode(
    x=alt.X(
        "YearMonth:T",
        title="Year",
        axis=alt.Axis(
            format="%Y",
            tickCount="year",
            labelAngle=0
        )
    ),
    y=alt.Y("AQI:Q", title="Average AQI"),
    tooltip=["YearMonth:T", "AQI:Q"]
).properties(
    width=750,
    height=400,
    title="Monthly Average AQI (2018–2025)"
)

```

```{python}
#plotting aqi for cook county over time

cook = aqi_all[aqi_all['county Name'] == 'Cook'] 



cook["YearMonth"] = cook["Date"].dt.to_period("M").astype(str)

monthly_avg_cook = (
    cook
    .groupby("YearMonth")["AQI"]
    .mean()
    .reset_index()
)

monthly_avg_cook.describe()
monthly_avg.describe()

cook_aqi = alt.Chart(monthly_avg_cook).mark_line().encode(
    x=alt.X(
        "YearMonth:T",
        title="Year",
        axis=alt.Axis(
            format="%Y",
            tickCount="year",
            labelAngle=0
        )
    ),
    y=alt.Y("AQI:Q", title="Average AQI"),
    tooltip=["YearMonth:T", "AQI:Q"]
).properties(
    width=750,
    height=400,
    title="Monthly Average AQI in Cook County (2018–2025)"
)

print("Illinois mean AQI:", aqi_all["AQI"].mean())
print("Cook mean AQI:", cook["AQI"].mean())

```

```{python}
cook_aqi & illinois_aqi
```

```{python}
import pandas as pd
import altair as alt

# --- Illinois monthly avg ---
aqi_all["YearMonth"] = aqi_all["Date"].dt.to_period("M").dt.to_timestamp()

illinois_monthly = (
    aqi_all
    .groupby("YearMonth", as_index=False)["AQI"]
    .mean()
)
illinois_monthly["Place"] = "Illinois"

# --- Cook monthly avg ---
cook = aqi_all[aqi_all["county Name"] == "Cook"].copy()
cook["YearMonth"] = cook["Date"].dt.to_period("M").dt.to_timestamp()

cook_monthly = (
    cook
    .groupby("YearMonth", as_index=False)["AQI"]
    .mean()
)
cook_monthly["Place"] = "Cook County"

# --- Combine ---
combined = pd.concat([illinois_monthly, cook_monthly], ignore_index=True)

# --- One chart ---
aqi_both = alt.Chart(combined).mark_line().encode(
    x=alt.X("YearMonth:T", title="Year",
            axis=alt.Axis(format="%Y", tickCount="year", labelAngle=0)),
    y=alt.Y("AQI:Q", title="Average AQI"),
    color=alt.Color("Place:N", title=""),
    tooltip=[
        alt.Tooltip("YearMonth:T", title="Month"),
        alt.Tooltip("Place:N"),
        alt.Tooltip("AQI:Q", format=".1f")
    ]
).properties(
    width=750,
    height=400,
    title="Monthly Average AQI: Illinois vs Cook County (2018–2025)"
)

aqi_both
```
